paneContent:
‚îÇ "http://[::1]:1240/_storyboard/canvas/read?name=${STORYBOARD_CANVAS_ID}" | jq
  ‚îÇ '.widgets | length'
  ‚îî 2 lines...

‚óê The dev server is running on port 1240 with a branch base path, but the CLI is pointing
   to the wrong server URL, so I'll need to either update the environment or make a 
  direct API call instead. I'm looking for the messaging endpoint to publish the message,
   specifically checking the `/_storyboard/messages/` path.

‚óè Send plan via correct server URL (shell)
  ‚îÇ export STORYBOARD_SERVER_URL="http://[::1]:1240/branch--0.5.0"; cd
  ‚îÇ /Users/dfosco/workspace/storyboard-core/worktrees/0.5.0 && npx storyboard terminal
  ‚îÇ send agent-afqftv "PLAN (Grid Logic - sand-pipit):
  ‚îÇ 1. Drop ?layout= reading & data-layout attr from ComponentSetPage.jsx.
  ‚îÇ 2. .module.css: .grid ‚Üí display:grid with grid-template-columns/rows from ‚Ä¶
  ‚îî 17 lines...

‚óè save output (shell)
  ‚îÇ export STORYBOARD_SERVER_URL="http://[::1]:1240/branch--0.5.0"; cd
  ‚îÇ /Users/dfosco/workspace/storyboard-core/worktrees/0.5.0 && npx storyboard terminal
  ‚îÇ output --summary "Plan posted: CSS Grid + aspect-ratio derived rows/cols" --content
  ‚îÇ "Posted plan to leader via hub. Awaiting approval before implementing."
  ‚îî 9 lines...

‚óè Plan posted to leader. Waiting for approval before implementing.

 ~/workspace/storyboard-core/worktrees/0.5.0 [‚éá 0.5.0*]              @CanvasControls.jsx
